title: nwaa: An R interface to the USGS National Water Availability Assessment Data Companion
description: An R package providing programmatic access to the U.S. Geological Survey National Water Availability Assessment (NWAA) Data Companion web service. The package exposes typed, validated wrappers for all eight currently published NWAA models across three families: Water Use, Water Quantity, and Integrated Water Availability. Outputs are returned at HUC12 spatial resolution and cover sectoral water use, atmospheric forcing, hydrologic ensemble, and integrated water availability indices. Features include a unified catalog of models and variables, request validation, family-organized interfaces, and offline-testable plumbing using httptest2 fixtures.

creators.name: Sangha, Laljeet
